race.comment: SPARKLE CORNER (1) lifted again beaten just 0.7L over this trip in stronger. Has a top hoop aboard today and rates to go one better. DEEP DISCRETION (6) is the danger building on her easy 2.7L win over 1200m in a CL2. Has an awkward gate but the 2kg claim is handy and she will be belting home again. HARD QUESTIONS (2) has raced his last three over longer and it wasn't a bad effort in tougher at Ascot last time. Drops back to 1417m off a 49-day freshen and with the benefit of a 2kg claim should be finishing it off. KENTUCKY BLUE (3) was beaten 3L here second-up and the extra metres suit. Uses the low gate and should be in it a long way. CRIMMO (8) resumes for a new yard with a 3kg claim. Hasn't won for a long time but the new camp may find the key.
